system: MFSA Connect Design System — Complete Spacing Scale & Conventions

tailwind_spacing_base.description: Uses Tailwind v4 default spacing scale (1 rem = 16px base). No custom spacing overrides.

dominant_spacing_units_observed.description: Real-world spacing usage frequency across the codebase, sorted by dominance.
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_1.5: 12+ occurrences — form item gaps, card gaps
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_2: 30+ occurrences — sidebar padding, general gaps, card internal
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_3: 25+ occurrences — padding in menu items, inputs, table cells
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_4: 35+ occurrences — primary spacing: page padding, card padding, grid gaps, section padding
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_6: 20+ occurrences — section padding, layout containers, page content X padding
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_8: 10+ occurrences — card header/content padding X, larger gaps
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_10: 3+ occurrences — button padding X (default: px-6, lg: px-8)
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_12: 5+ occurrences — section vertical padding, large gaps
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_16: 8+ occurrences — footer padding, section vertical padding (py-16)
dominant_spacing_units_observed.px_24: 5+ occurrences — section vertical padding (py-24), hero sections

border_radius.system: Custom radius scale defined in @theme directive. ALL components use rounded-none (0px border-radius) as the default.

border_radius_philosophy.description: The design system uses ZERO border radius (rounded-none) for virtually ALL UI components by explicit design. This is the single most distinctive visual characteristic.

responsive_spacing_behavior.pattern: Uses md: prefix for responsive overrides. On mobile, spacing typically stays the same or reduces padding.
examples: md:grid-cols-2 → switches from single to multi-column

whitespace_philosophy.density: Moderate-to-low density. Generous padding in cards (py-8 px-8). Comfortable grid gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Large section padding (py-24 for landing sections).
whitespace_philosophy.breathing_room: Pages have consistent space-y-6 between major sections. Dashboard content has p-6 padding. Card groups have gap-4 spacing.
whitespace_philosophy.mobile_handling: Dashboard p-6 reduces to implicit padding. Login forms use max-w-md with consistent padding. No hamburger menu — sidebar collapses to icon-only.
